description: Create a storage audit report for all Emoncms feeds as a CSV file at '~/feed_storage_audit.csv'. The report must be sorted by feed ID ascending and include the following headers: id, name, tag, engine, engine_name (mapping engine code 5 to 'PHPFina' and 2 to 'PHPTimeseries'), interval (seconds), npoints, start_time (timestamp), and size (bytes). Access the system via the Emoncms API (admin keys in ~/emoncms_apikeys.sh) or direct MySQL queries.
